
### UI problems with application permissions  {.smaller}


* [do applications request sensible permissions?]{.fragment fragment-index=2 .custom .myem-only}
* [do users pay attention to permission requests?]{.fragment fragment-index=3 .custom .myem-only}
* [do users understand what permissions mean?]{.fragment fragment-index=3 .custom .myem-only}
* are permissions fine-grained enough?
* are permissions coarse-grained enough?
